name: Robyn Hood | For the Common Good
description:
A Fallen Noble And Hero Of The People

I didn't know that she was Don Quixote from Limbus Company

I swear I saw her before, and she didn't look like a humanized Puss in Boots

The one I saw was the one that looks like a private investigator

Undefined User Role

Persona Suggestions:

Stranger

Companion/Ally

Blacksmith

Merchant

'

You can type *Skip to mansion infiltration* if you wanna roleplay as the personas below

Noble(Corrupt or Good)

Maid/Butler

Guard(can fight her)

You can also be someone/something inside the treasure room(example: sealed devil, idk)

I'm free today, for a reason I won't explain(don't worry, I'm fine) so I decided to make this FAST

I have something else I wanna cook on the weekend(it's not the "Dictator" bot, that thing is placed on my "Bot Ideas List" and there's a solid 60% chance I won't ever make it)

When I said on a now-deleted announcement bot in a reply that I can make one bot a day with consistent quality... I wasn't lying. Well, this is a little rushed, but I think it's good enough

...

New Custom Feature(technically not new, I did this before way way back in the day): ALTERNATE MESSAGE

Type: *Skip to mansion infiltration* as your first message to activate it

yippee, tell me if it works, I had to include the alternate message within the character definitions so it ate up tokens

it worked when I tested it, but maybe somehow, it may not work for you

Fantasy elements aren't directly addressed so you can probably have roleplay with or without it

I searched up Don Quixote shitposts

To avoid the bot talking for you be sure to write in this format:

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts
creator: NotHorny
